violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. Employee in the kitchen was handling croissants and tortillas with bare hands to finish sandwiches.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A bag of flour was stored on the floor in the back room.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of hot cups, microwave containers, and hinged containers were stored on the floor in the back room.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Foam containers on the counter and shelves in the kitchen were not inverted.
